audience: Operations teams replacing spreadsheets or building dashboards, planning tools and secure portals
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een webapplicatie laten maken voor dashboards, planning, offertes, portalen of interne processen.

searchIntent.question: How can a custom browser-based application improve our workflow and centralise business data?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs and organisations in Belgium

directAnswer: A custom web application lets authorised users manage data and complete workflows in a modern browser. Define roles, information, exceptions and integrations first, then build usable modules and migrate existing data carefully.
title: Web application development for SMEs in Belgium | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Custom web application development for planning, dashboards, quotations and customer portals. Secure, scalable browser-based software for SMEs in Belgium.
factsToPreserve: A web application runs in a browser across desktop, tablet and mobile
Existing data can often be migrated after quality assessment
A PWA or mobile app is considered only when intensive mobile use justifies it
